basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 41/14/03/2025-BRNS/1215. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow position. Candidates holding B.E./B.Tech (with NET/GATE qualification) or M.E./M.Tech (with GATE qualification) in relevant engineering disciplines are eligible to apply through IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Official Website. The application process is active up to 30 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech (with NET/GATE qualification) or M.E./M.Tech (with GATE qualification) in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Polymer Engineering, Nanotechnology, Surface Engineering, or allied disciplines.
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech (with NET/GATE qualification) or M.E./M.Tech (with GATE qualification) in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Polymer Engineering, Nanotechnology, Surface Engineering, or allied disciplines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech with NET/GATE qualification or M.E./M.Tech with GATE qualification in specific engineering disciplines like Metallurgical, Materials Science, Mechanical, Polymer, Nanotechnology, or Surface Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly formatted.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which disciplines are considered allied for the qualification?
faq.answer: The notification mentions allied disciplines for Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Polymer Engineering, Nanotechnology, and Surface Engineering. Please refer to the official PDF for a detailed list.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
